title: Lucky Block Bedwars Skywardvoyager
description: This is my revamped version of popularmmos lucky block bedwars in 1.20.1 with extra content! THE LUCKY BLOCK MOD HAS TO BE INSTALLED MANUALLY DUE TO THE LUCKY BLOCK MODS RESTRICTIONS.
body:
# Lucky Block Bedwars Skywardvoyager Edition
[Discord](https://discord.gg/akHBVzRPXe), [MyChannel](https://www.youtube.com/@Skywardvoyager)

This 1.20.1 Lucky Block Bedwars Modpack adds a couple mods that allow the minigame lucky block bedwars to be functional, **_it adds a map in the saves folder_** of the modpack which is named ready for setup and **_it is reccomended to have a backup of this world_** as it is at all times so you can go in and setup the world but still have the ready for setup world if you want to use a different lucky block. 

**_Currently the Lucky Block Mod has to be installed manually_** which is a **_core feature of the game_** if you have questions about that refer to the [discord server](https://discord.gg/akHBVzRPXe) or the soon to be posted youtube video.
